name: PER_CHK_CONTENT_ITEMS_VL
query: select B.CHK_CONTENT_ITEM_ID, B.CONTENT_ITEM_CODE, B.CHK_CONTENT_DEFN_ID, B.SEQUENCE, T.TITLE, T.DESCRIPTION, B.NOTE_CONTENT_DEFN_ID, B.CONTENT_URL, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM PER_CHK_CONTENT_ITEMS_B B, PER_CHK_CONTENT_ITEMS_TL T WHERE B.CHK_CONTENT_ITEM_ID = T.CHK_CONTENT_ITEM_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
